    Common abstract class for external prover calls.

    Common abstract class for external prover reasoners.

    Utility class for extracting a file bundled within a plug-in.

    XProverCall
    Deprecated.
    use XProverCall2 instead
    XProverCall2
    Common protocol for running an external prover.
    XProverInput
    Implements a simple reasoner input for a reasoner that takes either the selected hypotheses or all visible hypotheses, and is run with a timeout.
    XProverReasoner
    Deprecated.
    use XProverReasoner2 instead
    XProverReasoner2
    Abstract base class for running an external prover as a reasoner.
